actors.name: Karol Nawrocki
actors.blurb: Karol Nawrocki is prominently featured in the news due to his proposal for a national referendum on EU climate policies. This move has sparked significant debate and media coverage, highlighting his efforts to address economic concerns and assert national sovereignty over EU directives.

actors.name: Javier Milei
actors.blurb: Javier Milei is a central figure in the news due to his economic policies and political strategies. His announcement of a 'Super RIGI' to attract investments, his defense of Manuel Adorni amid corruption allegations, and his broader economic reforms are key topics driving media coverage.
